word: H5863 - עִיֵּי הָעֲבָרִים - ʻÎyêy hâ-ʻĂbârîym - ee-yay' haw-ab-aw-reem' - Ije-abarim

sections.paragraph:
Original: עיּי העברים

Transliteration: ‛iyêy hâ‛ăbârı̂ym

Phonetic: ee-yay' haw-ab-aw-reem'

BDB Definition:

Ije-abarim = "ruins of Abarim"
  1. a station of Israel in the wilderness on the southeast side of Moab
  2. a town in Judah

Origin: from the pl. of H5856 and the pl. of the act. part.of H5674 with the article interposed

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
